description: Archived resolved residuals from acp-client plan. ACP-R1 (frozen capability IDs) and ACP-R2 (probe command) were resolved during tech spec refinement by @architect.

entries.title: Missing frozen capability ID contract reference
entries.scope: ACP skill/capability registration — must reference frozen capability ID list from ACP Registry
entries.target: Resolved in tech spec §5.2 — 6 frozen capability IDs defined (FILE_SYSTEM_READ, FILE_SYSTEM_WRITE, TERMINAL_CREATE, TERMINAL_OUTPUT, TERMINAL_RELEASE)

entries.title: Missing nexus42 acp probe command
entries.scope: CLI command — probe ACP Registry or local agent to verify connectivity and capability set
entries.target: Resolved in tech spec §6.2 — `nexus42 agent probe` command defined with registry probe and local agent probe modes
